title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for successfully building with Claude Code, inspired by Y Combinator CEO Gary Tan, and outlines six moves for becoming an AI team leader. The video covers what not to build, what to build, and a four-question test for vetting projects before starting.
